purpose: Verify that the migrated safety reference catalog is connected to product routes and document remediation.

productUse.documentRemediation: Rubric-based remediation now includes migrated safety_reference_items evidence in the generation prompt.
productUse.evidenceLibrary: Evidence page surfaces catalog counts and links users to the knowledge DB.
productUse.knowledgeDb: Knowledge page surfaces Supabase catalog totals, KOSHA technical support split, and sample items.
productUse.apiOperations: API operations page surfaces catalog status next to dryrun/smoke state.

notes: The first local smoke exposed a missing source_url column assumption. The helper now normalizes source_url to null instead of selecting a non-existent column.
Production should be checked again after deployment via /api/safety-reference/status and one remediation request.
